job_title: Business and Administrative Intern - Manufacturing EHS, Safety
job_description:
• While performing the duties of this job, the employee is frequently required to stand.
• The employee is occasionally required to walk, climb or balance.
• Assist with the preparation of documentation and reports required for regulatory agencies (OSHA, IEPA, etc.
• In the performance of the duties of this job, the employee is required to travel, drive a motor vehicle.
• Travel could be up to 10% of the time Proficient skills in microsoft and google software suites, with experience managing EHS enterprise software systems.
• Willingness to work flexible hours, including occasional extended shifts or weekends, to support production needs.
• Actively pursuing a degree or one closely related in Environmental Health and Safety, Engineering or similar.
• Must be currently pursuing a bachelors degree, and returning to school following the internship term.
